tasks.name: MQTT Publisher Startup Retry and Disconnect Monitoring
tasks.description: Wrap initial connect() in retry loop with exponential backoff (3 attempts, 1s/2s/4s). Register on_connect and on_disconnect callbacks for visibility. Do not add custom reconnection beyond paho's built-in loop_start() reconnect. Test: mock connect to fail once then succeed; verify 3 consecutive failures raise.

tasks.name: CsvWriter Idempotent Close
tasks.description: Guard CsvWriter.close() with self._file.closed check before flush/close. Apply same to ParquetWriter if needed. Test: double-close produces no exception. Test: write_tick after close is handled cleanly.

tasks.name: SIGTERM Handler for Graceful Docker Shutdown
tasks.description: Register SIGTERM handler via loop.add_signal_handler in _run_realtime(). Handler cancels current task to flow through existing finally cleanup. Apply to batch mode path too. Test: verify signal handler is registered (code-level check).

tasks.name: Profile-Aware 0x06 Device Busy Exception
tasks.description: Make state signal configurable per ModbusServer instance (state_signal_id parameter). Packaging uses press.machine_state, F&B uses per-equipment state signals. Update _check_machine_state_transition() to use configured signal. Wire through topology manager for realistic mode. Test: F&B Modbus server fires 0x06 on state transition.

tasks.name: Wire EvaluationConfig into FactoryConfig
tasks.description: Add evaluation field to FactoryConfig. Add evaluation section to both YAML configs. Wire config.evaluation into evaluator (pre/post margins, severity weights, latency targets, seeds). Maintain backward compat (defaults when section absent). Test: custom evaluation config overrides defaults in evaluator.

tasks.name: Validate All Fixes — Full Suite
tasks.description: Run ruff + mypy + pytest full suite. Verify no regressions from 6a. Verify both profiles load with evaluation config. Fix any failures.
